## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes
- [ ] Checked in browser at `http://localhost:3456` (or Live Preview over HTTP)
- [ ] If UI: light + dark mode; mobile width if layout-related
- [ ] If companies: evidence / `LastVerified` updated per research guide
